prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年苏州大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约9699名、8780名、10565名、11234名、9039名，整体呈现较大波动，2022年曾冲高至8780名，2024年 回落至11234名，2025年又回升至9039名，近两年波动幅度约2200名，2025年基准位次约9039名；该校在上海市招生计划2021年33人、2022年31人、2023年29人 、2024年30人、2025年30人；2026年计划大幅扩招至39人（较2025年增加9人，增幅30%），扩招幅度显著，将直接拉低录取门槛，使位次数字明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大 学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第40–46名区间（2026年排名第46位），属于中上水平211院校，综合实力较强；2024年声誉 偏正面（食堂改善获好评）；2026年声誉转为偏负面，涉及一起男大学生恶意利用女同学照片的法律事件，可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第46位（较热），综 合热度约85.7万，关注度处于中等偏上水平；第五轮学科评估中，苏州大学拥有体育学A-、药学A-两个A类学科，另有材料科学与工程、临床医学等多个B+学科 ，学科实力较为均衡，但A类学科数量偏少。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 苏州大学在沪招生专业以临床医学、软件工程、机器人工程、光电信息科学与工程、通信工程、纳米材料与 技术等理工热门专业为主，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏高；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35%，考生规模大幅增 长将加剧整体竞争；苏州大学位于江苏省苏州市，与上海市地理相邻，高铁通勤约30分钟，对上海考生具有显著的地域便 利性和吸引力，有利于维持较高的报考热度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9039名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招30%（从30人增至39人）这一核心因素；同时考虑上海市2026年考生总数大幅增长约35%加剧竞争、苏州大学地域优势及热门专业吸引力对报考的正面拉动，以及声誉偏负面的轻微抑制，经综合权 衡后预测2026年最低录取位次约10636名，较2025年小幅后移约1597名，区间10136–11136名。扩招是位次后移的最主要驱动因素，考生总数增加和地域吸引力则起到部分对冲作用 。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测2026年最低录取位次约10636名，区间10136–11136名。位次在预测区间内（约10100–11100名）的考生建议以二档专业为主力选择，一档专业（临床医学、软件工程等）可作 为冲刺目标，三档专业（材料类、护理学、建筑学等）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（约10100名以内）的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（约11100名 以外）的考生建议以三档保底为主，争取二档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Soochow University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 9699, 8780, 10565, 11234, and 9039, showing significant fluctuations. In 2022, it peaked at 8780, dropped to 11234 in 2024, and rebounded to 9039 in 2025. The fluctuation range in recent two years is about 2200 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 9039 in 2025. The enrollment plan in Shanghai was 33 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 30 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 39 (an increase of 9 from 2025, a 30% increase), which will directly lower the admission threshold and shift the ranking number significantly backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable in the 40–46 range in recent years (ranked 46th in 2026), placing it among mid-to-upper level 211 institutions with relatively strong comprehensive strength. In 2024, its reputation was slightly positive (cafeteria improvements received praise). In 2026, the reputation turned slightly negative due to a legal incident involving a male college student maliciously using a female classmate's photos, which may have a slight dampening effect on application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 46th (relatively popular), with a comprehensive popularity of about 857,000, indicating moderate to high attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University has two A-level disciplines: Physical Education A- and Pharmacy A-, along with multiple B+ disciplines such as Materials Science and Engineering and Clinical Medicine. The discipline strength is relatively balanced, but the number of A-level disciplines is relatively small.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Soochow University's enrollment majors in Shanghai are mainly popular science and engineering fields such as Clinical Medicine, Software Engineering, Robotics Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Communication Engineering, and Nanomaterials and Technology. Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Shanghai is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35% from 49,276 in 2025. This significant growth in candidate numbers will intensify overall competition. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, adjacent to Shanghai with a high-speed rail commute of about 30 minutes, offering significant geographical convenience and attractiveness to Shanghai candidates, helping to maintain a relatively high application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 9039 in 2025 and the core factor of a 30% expansion in enrollment plan in 2026 (from 30 to 39), along with the approximately 35% increase in total candidates in Shanghai in 2026 intensifying competition, the positive pull of Soochow University's geographical advantage and popular majors on applications, and the slight dampening effect of a negative reputation, after comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 10,636, a backward shift of about 1,597 from 2025, with a range of 10,136–11,136. The enrollment expansion is the main driver of the ranking shift, while the increase in candidate numbers and geographical attractiveness partially offset it.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 10,636, with a range of 10,136–11,136. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (approximately 10,100–11,100) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as primary choices, with Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine, Software Engineering, etc.) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Nursing, Architecture, etc.) as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within approximately 10,100) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper bound of the range (outside approximately 11,100) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 majors as backups while aiming for Tier 2 majors.
